text.title: Feedback Loop Customer Reply Templates Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) + valid and invalid examples + forbidden patterns pinning the shape of a valid playbook-step artefact emitted by Feedback Loop Customer Reply Templates.

example.note: All required fields populated; rule reference resolves into 01-core-rules.xml; owner is a named individual.
Required fields missing (evidence, consumer, owner, last_touched); rules_applied empty; artefact_id form invalid.

forbidden.pattern: artefact produced without any evidence entry referencing a rule_id
consumer or owner empty or set to generic 'team' / 'we' / 'everyone'
rules_applied references rule ids not present in content/01-core-rules.xml
evidence cites 'industry standard' / 'common practice' with no named source
applies_if guard failed AND artefact still produced (must be a skip-record with reason)
